meaning: n.[医]浆液一般的性质,如水液体,浆液
examples: The size of serosity had an influence on the utilization ratio of materials to some extent.
Besides , it's feasible to crack mend when distortion is requested to use the right amount of 660 diluter which can increase toughness of the serosity .
In order to ensure the intensity of grouting, the measures of ending with concentrated serosity, pressured grouting and blocking out were employed, which had rather better results.
